title: A Strange Facility Beneath the Giant Tree
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Robin, Unknown person #8, Loki, Unknown person #9, Usopp as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Come back!! Where are you all going?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The entire country needs to be alerted!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: something's off, Saul!! Look at the forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one could call it overkill after seeing this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Put me down, Saul! Let me examine them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Okay!! Help them with whatever this is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta stop the other kids and get them to safety!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you think just keeping one seasons SHACKLE ON...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...would be enough to SAP my strength? How naive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you care about keeping Elbaf safe, remove the last shackle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rest assured... even in my current state, I'm far from helpless!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd hurry if I were you. If I strike... the flames will rage!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You know about Elbaf's greatest weakness, right?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
